title: Past to future
description: Past to future is a modpack about bringing technology to the medieval fantasy world of ice and fire and iron's spellbooks. Will you become this world's innovator?
body:
Welcome to past to future, a modpack focused on bringing futuristic tech to the medieval world of magic and fantasy creatures. in this modpack you can build massive factories, master the art of magic, tame a dragon and much much more.

some of the key mods in this pack:
Applied energistics 2
create
ice and fire
iron's spellbooks
deep mob learning
draconic evolution
